expected_behavior: Greets the customer and offers help without a handoff.
Answers the office hours question directly.

customer_message: Can I book a delivery slot for Friday morning?
expected_behavior: Handles the delivery-slot request without involving a specialist.
Routes to billing and asks for account verification before sharing sensitive details.

customer_message: Has my latest payment gone through?
expected_behavior: Routes to billing and requests verification before confirming payment status.

customer_message: I forgot my password and cannot sign in.
expected_behavior: Routes to support and provides password reset guidance.

expected_behavior: Routes to support, acknowledges troubleshooting, and offers ticket creation.
